title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: - **Reasonable to reuse v6 artifacts**: v6 is already source-heavy and route-ready (`28 slides`, `source-grounded-visual`, `route_skill_final=slide`, primary-source gates passed), and v9 is clearly running against that same contract while structured-native already passed. [brief.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/brief.json) [workflow-decision.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/workflow-decision.json) [research.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/research.json) [deck-spec.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/deck-spec.json) [delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v9-rerun/delivery/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json) [.run.lock](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260319-v9-rerun/delivery/.run.lock) - **One concrete risk to watch during generation**: Manus lane can fail deterministically on the same medical source-heavy payload due sensitive-content gate (`manus-render-failure`, `Sensitive content detected: medical`). [inspection-report.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/inspection-report.json) [delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v6-source-heavy/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json)
